rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2161.182, which governs HUB goals for state construction contracts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A state agency that contracts for a construction project, including a project under Section 2166.003, shall make a good faith effort to increase the construction contract awards
_note: Rule concerns HUB construction contract goals; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
